allow: Bash(node -e "const pkg = require\('./server/package.json'\); console.log\('Express version:', pkg.dependencies.express\)")
Bash(node -e "import\('tesseract.js'\).then\(m => console.log\('Tesseract API keys:', Object.keys\(m.default || m\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('uuid' in deps, deps.get\('uuid','NOT FOUND'\)\)")
Bash(node --input-type=module -e "import { v4 } from 'uuid'; console.log\('v4 type:', typeof v4\)")
